info.description: Multiplayer chess game server with WebSocket real-time gameplay, chat, and voice signalling.
info.title: Chess Game API

get.description: Returns all games waiting for a second player.

post.description: Creates a new chess game. Choose your color (w/b) and opponent type.

get.description: Returns all games the current user is participating in.
Returns a game by its UUID.
Returns the chat history for a game.

post.description: Sends a chat message in a game. The message is broadcast to all players via WebSocket.
Joins a waiting game as the second player.

get.description: Returns the move history for a game.
Returns the active voice session for a game, if one exists.

post.description: Initiates a WebRTC voice call in a game. Signalling travels over WebSocket.

delete.description: Ends a voice session. Either player in the game can end the call.

patch.description: Accepts an incoming voice call. Only the non-initiating player can accept.

get.description: Checks database connectivity and returns readiness status.
Returns whether a username is taken or available.

post.description: Verifies email address with the 6-digit OTP code.
Issues a new access token using a valid refresh token.
Resends the OTP verification code to the user's email.
Authenticates with email and password. Returns access + refresh tokens.
Creates an account and sends a 6-digit OTP to the provided email.
